prompt:
As a statistician, I want to use r2rtf package to create a baseline characteristics table. 

Please first learn the r2rtf package grammar and logic before you start.

Goal: create a table by treatment group for age, sex, race, bmi and ethnicity. 
Data: https://github.com/Merck/r2rtf/blob/master/data/r2rtf_adsl.rda 
Example: https://github.com/elong0527/r4csr/edit/main/tlf-baseline.qmd

Note: the order of categorical variable should follow clinical convention instead of simple alphabetic.
expected_output: A baseline characteristic table by treatment group like https://r4csr.org/tlf-baseline.html
assertions: Identified one of the treatment group variable
Proper order variable following clinical convention. e.g. Other / Missing should be at the end.
